critique: Outstanding visual clarity: the serif/sans-serif pairing, warm earth-tone palette, and consistent use of CSS custom properties create a premium brand feel. The CSS-only coffee-circle hero visual is creative. Responsiveness is well-handled — the two-column hero collapses to single-column on mobile, the nav hides links gracefully, and the product grid reflows cleanly. Functional completeness covers the landing-page use case thoroughly (nav, hero, product cards, brand story, email subscription with feedback state); the subscribe confirmation state is a nice touch. Code quality is high: logical section organisation, no magic numbers, good use of clamp() for fluid typography.
